name: Sarah M.
text: The morning Ashtanga class transformed my entire day. I leave every session feeling grounded, energized, and truly at peace with myself.

name: Ravi K.
text: My Ayurveda consultation was a revelation. The personalized diet and lifestyle recommendations changed how I relate to my body and energy completely.

name: Linda T.
text: As a complete beginner, I was nervous. The welcoming, patient instruction made me feel safe from day one. I now practice every week without fail.
